quick_skim.title: KARMA: Knowledge graph-based Automated Reasoning Materialization and Alignment
quick_skim.abstract: Template-based contrastive synthesis is scalable, but its candidates often differ only in a few entity-slots while sequence-level optimization spreads supervision over mostly shared templates. We formalize this as the Resolution Mismatch Problem and propose KARMA, which enumerates schema-constrained paths over domain knowledge graphs and verbalizes them into slot-aligned contrastive candidates. Slot-Parallel Alignment (SPA) then applies a decoupled slot-level objective to route preference supervision to discriminative entity-slots, with slot-aware masked attention serving as an optional packed-evaluation implementation. Across biomedical, computer-science, and chemistry benchmarks, KARMA outperforms base LLM and same-data SFT baselines, and compares favorably with sequence and token-level preference methods.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: biomedical KG used for contrastive learning with LLM, transferable to cold-start DDI
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 生物医学知识图谱结合LLM的对比学习方法，可迁移至冷启动药物相互作用预测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 生物医学知识图谱结合LLM的对比学习方法，可迁移至冷启动药物相互作用预测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 生物医学知识图谱结合LLM的对比学习方法，可迁移至冷启动药物相互作用预测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: KARMA uses KG paths to generate slot-aligned contrastive candidates for LLM training, improving performance on biomedical benchmarks, offering transferable method for cold-start DDI.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对模板对比学习中候选样本差异小导致监督分散的问题，本文提出KARMA方法，通过枚举生物医学等领域知识图谱的模式约束路径，生成槽对齐的对比候选。同时提出槽并行对齐（SPA）目标，将偏好监督路由到判别性实体槽。在生物医学、计算机科学和化学基准上，KARMA显著优于基础LLM和同数据SFT基线。该方法虽未直接针对药物相互作用预测，但其利用知识图谱增强LLM对比学习的范式可直接迁移至冷启动药物相互作用场景，为组合需求提供方法论支撑。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对模板对比学习中候选样本差异小导致监督分散的问题，本文提出KARMA方法，通过枚举生物医学等领域知识图谱的模式约束路径，生成槽对齐的对比候选。同时提出槽并行对齐（SPA）目标，将偏好监督路由到判别性实体槽。在生物医学、计算机科学和化学基准上，KARMA显著优于基础LLM和同数据SFT基线。该方法虽未直接针对药物相互作用预测，但其利用知识图谱增强LLM对比学习的范式可直接迁移至冷启动药物相互作用场景，为组合需求提供方法论支撑。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 请帮我查找ColdDDI：利用大型语言模型和生物医学知识图谱进行冷启动药物相互作用预测该方向有关的论文, especially work that connects or combines: Large Language Model + Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction; cold-start drug-drug interaction prediction; large language model for drug interaction; drug interaction prediction with knowledge graph; knowledge graph completion for drug discovery; cold start prediction in drug interaction; Cold start drug drug interaction prediction using large language models and biomedical knowledge graphs; Leveraging knowledge graphs for cold start drug interaction with large language models; Biomedical knowledge graph enhanced drug interaction prediction for new drugs.
